name: siphika-chauffeur
description: Siphika Chauffeur — Premium ride booking app

scripts.android: npm run build && cordova run android
scripts.android:dev: npm run build && cordova run android --device
scripts.android:rel: npm run build && cordova build android --release
scripts.ios: node -e "console.error('iOS builds require macOS + Xcode. Run this on a Mac.');process.exit(1)"
scripts.ios:dev: node -e "console.error('iOS builds require macOS + Xcode. Run this on a Mac.');process.exit(1)"
scripts.ios:rel: node -e "console.error('iOS builds require macOS + Xcode. Run this on a Mac.');process.exit(1)"

cordova-plugin-geolocation.GEOLOCATION_USAGE_DESCRIPTION: Siphika uses location to set your pickup point.
